summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Mini Editor animation composition controls. All new composition features are properly implemented including timeline activity spans, connection lines, shift keyframes, duplicate+offset, copy/paste keyframes, and onion skin preview. Backend APIs working perfectly.
passed_tests: Backend /api/health endpoint returns 200 with healthy status and timestamp
Backend /api/ root endpoint returns correct Mini Editor API info
Backend /api/status CRUD operations work correctly (create and retrieve)
Backend /api/export GIF functionality works with test frames
Backend /api/export WebM functionality works with test frames
Backend export error handling works (invalid format and no frames return 400)
App loads correctly with all main UI components (canvas, timeline, right panel)
Timeline activity span and connection line code properly implemented (lines 427-454 in Timeline.js)
Shift keyframes buttons correctly hidden when no layer selected
Duplicate + Offset button correctly hidden when no layer selected
Onion Skin toggle correctly hidden when no layer selected (proper conditional rendering)
Timeline copy/paste buttons correctly hidden when no keyframe selected
Easing selector correctly hidden when no keyframe selected
Multi-select keyframes code implemented with Shift+Click support (lines 191-201 in Timeline.js)
Copy/paste keyframes functionality implemented in both Timeline and RightPanel
Timing Controls section properly implemented with shift keyframes controls
Trail Effect section properly implemented with duplicate+offset functionality
Project settings visible and functional when no layer selected
Timeline playhead and playhead handle found and functional
Timeline tracks area ready for activity spans and connection lines
Keyboard shortcuts work correctly (V=Select, C=Cut, P=Pivot, Space=Play/Pause)
Tool buttons clickable and functional (Select, Cut, Pivot)
Timeline controls work (Play, Pause, Stop, Loop toggle)
Canvas zoom interactions work (mouse wheel zoom in/out)
Timeline click to set playhead position works
Playhead dragging functionality works
Canvas zoom display shows correct info (100% | 512×512)
Timeline time display functional
Export button correctly disabled without layers
File upload inputs present (2 inputs found)
Empty state messaging appropriate ('No layers', 'Upload an image to start')
